message:
fix(tls): flush writes before handshake completion check + add 48 conformance tests (bd-31p8)

Fix poll_handshake to write pending TLS data before checking is_handshaking(),
ensuring final handshake messages (e.g. client Finished) are flushed to the
transport. Without this, the peer never receives the final message and hangs.

Add comprehensive TLS integration tests covering handshake state machine,
ALPN negotiation (h2/http/grpc/mismatch), mTLS, session resumption config,
certificate pin sets, domain validation, TLS 1.2 forced mode, error types,
data roundtrip, SNI hostname, concurrent handshakes, and stream utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
